title: [OM] Add reduction patterns for circt-reduce
body:
Implements six reduction patterns for the OM dialect:

1. OMClassParameterPruner (Benefit: 50) - Removes unused parameters from
   om.class definitions by analyzing parameter usage within the class body.

2. OMClassFieldPruner (Benefit: 49) - Removes unused output fields from
   om.class definitions by tracking which fields are accessed via
   om.object.field operations.

3. OMObjectToUnknownReplacer (Benefit: 48) - Replaces om.object
   instantiations with om.unknown when the object's fields are not accessed,
   reducing test case complexity.

4. OMListElementPruner (Benefit: 45) - Removes elements from om.list_create
   operations one at a time to minimize list sizes.

5. OMUnusedClassRemover (benefit: 40): Removes om.class definitions that
   are never instantiated via om.object. This helps eliminate dead class
   definitions that are only referenced via om.unknown.

6. OMAnyCastOfUnknownSimplifier (benefit: 35): Simplifies chains of
   om.unknown -> om.any_cast by replacing them with a direct om.unknown
   of the target type. This eliminates unnecessary cast operations.

These patterns follow the same architecture as FIRRTLReductions, with a
separate CIRCTOMReductions library to avoid circular dependencies. The
patterns use SymbolCache for efficient symbol table lookups and SymbolUserMap
to track symbol usage.

AI-assisted-by: Augment (Claude Sonnet 4.5)
